faqs.question: How much does yellow jacket removal cost in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Yellow jacket removal in Ardsley typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground nests are usually less expensive to treat than nests located in walls, attics, or high eaves. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a yellow jacket nest in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency yellow jacket removal services in Ardsley. Most yellow jacket nest eliminations are completed within 1-2 hours, though complete eradication may require a follow-up visit to ensure all wasps are eliminated. We recommend calling immediately if you discover a nest, especially if anyone in your household has allergies.

faqs.question: What's the best time to remove yellow jacket nests?
faqs.answer: Yellow jacket nests should be removed as soon as they're discovered, regardless of the season. However, treatment is most effective during early morning or evening hours when yellow jackets are less active and more likely to be inside the nest. Our technicians use professional-grade protective equipment to safely remove nests at any time of day.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets dangerous to my Ardsley property?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are highly aggressive and will defend their nests vigorously, stinging multiple times without dying. Unlike honeybees, they can sting repeatedly and often attack in swarms when threatened. This makes DIY removal extremely dangerous. Yellow jacket stings can cause severe allergic reactions, making professional removal essential for the safety of your family and pets.
